parameters.name: q
parameters.value: brand reputation OR brand monitoring OR brand voice AI

parameters.jsCode: const items=$input.all();const results=[];for(const item of items){const d=item.json;const title=(d.title||'').trim();const link=d.link||d.guid||'';const pubDate=d.pubDate||d.isoDate||d.date||d.updated||'';const content=(d['content:encoded']||d.contentSnippet||d.content||d.description||'').replace(/<[^>]*>/g,'').trim();let pd='';try{const dt=new Date(pubDate);if(!isNaN(dt))pd=dt.toISOString().split('T')[0]}catch(e){}if(!title||!pd)continue;const tl=title.toLowerCase();let tp='technology';if(/\b(ai|llm|gpt|machine learning|neural|model|agent|openai|anthropic)\b/.test(tl))tp='ai_ml';else if(/\b(brand|marketing|advertis|campaign|reputation)\b/.test(tl))tp='brand_marketing';else if(/\b(security|hack|breach|cyber|threat)\b/.test(tl))tp='security';else if(/\b(startup|funding|venture|valuation|ipo)\b/.test(tl))tp='business';else if(/\b(apple|google|microsoft|meta|amazon|nvidia)\b/.test(tl))tp='big_tech';results.push({json:{id:`rss-tc-${results.length+1}`,title:title.substring(0,150),source_name:'TechCrunch',source_url:link,published_date:pd,topic_category:tp,content_snippet:(content||title).substring(0,200),reliability_score:4,collection_method:'rss_feed'}})}return results;

const items=$input.all();const results=[];for(const item of items){const d=item.json;const title=(d.title||'').trim();const link=d.link||d.guid||'';const pubDate=d.pubDate||d.isoDate||d.date||d.updated||'';const content=(d['content:encoded']||d.contentSnippet||d.content||d.description||'').replace(/<[^>]*>/g,'').trim();let pd='';try{const dt=new Date(pubDate);if(!isNaN(dt))pd=dt.toISOString().split('T')[0]}catch(e){}if(!title||!pd)continue;const tl=title.toLowerCase();let tp='technology';if(/\b(ai|llm|gpt|machine learning|neural|model|agent|openai|anthropic)\b/.test(tl))tp='ai_ml';else if(/\b(brand|marketing|advertis|campaign|reputation)\b/.test(tl))tp='brand_marketing';else if(/\b(security|hack|breach|cyber|threat)\b/.test(tl))tp='security';else if(/\b(startup|funding|venture|valuation|ipo)\b/.test(tl))tp='business';else if(/\b(apple|google|microsoft|meta|amazon|nvidia)\b/.test(tl))tp='big_tech';results.push({json:{id:`rss-ars-${results.length+1}`,title:title.substring(0,150),source_name:'Ars Technica',source_url:link,published_date:pd,topic_category:tp,content_snippet:(content||title).substring(0,200),reliability_score:4,collection_method:'rss_feed'}})}return results;

const items=$input.all();const results=[];for(const item of items){const d=item.json;const title=(d.title||'').trim();const link=d.link||d.guid||'';const pubDate=d.pubDate||d.isoDate||d.date||d.updated||'';const content=(d['content:encoded']||d.contentSnippet||d.content||d.description||'').replace(/<[^>]*>/g,'').trim();let pd='';try{const dt=new Date(pubDate);if(!isNaN(dt))pd=dt.toISOString().split('T')[0]}catch(e){}if(!title||!pd)continue;const tl=title.toLowerCase();let tp='technology';if(/\b(ai|llm|gpt|machine learning|neural|model|agent|openai|anthropic)\b/.test(tl))tp='ai_ml';else if(/\b(brand|marketing|advertis|campaign|reputation)\b/.test(tl))tp='brand_marketing';else if(/\b(security|hack|breach|cyber|threat)\b/.test(tl))tp='security';else if(/\b(startup|funding|venture|valuation|ipo)\b/.test(tl))tp='business';else if(/\b(apple|google|microsoft|meta|amazon|nvidia)\b/.test(tl))tp='big_tech';results.push({json:{id:`rss-vg-${results.length+1}`,title:title.substring(0,150),source_name:'The Verge',source_url:link,published_date:pd,topic_category:tp,content_snippet:(content||title).substring(0,200),reliability_score:4,collection_method:'rss_feed'}})}return results;

const items=$input.all();const results=[];for(const item of items){const d=item.json;let title=(d.title||'').trim();const link=d.link||d.guid||'';const pubDate=d.pubDate||d.isoDate||d.date||d.updated||'';let pd='';try{const dt=new Date(pubDate);if(!isNaN(dt))pd=dt.toISOString().split('T')[0]}catch(e){}if(!title||!pd)continue;let sn='Google News';const parts=title.split(' - ');if(parts.length>1){sn=parts.pop().trim();title=parts.join(' - ').trim()}let rs=3;const sl=sn.toLowerCase();if(['reuters','associated press','bbc','bloomberg'].some(k=>sl.includes(k)))rs=5;else if(['techcrunch','wired','verge','cnn','cnbc','forbes'].some(k=>sl.includes(k)))rs=4;const tl=title.toLowerCase();let tp='brand_marketing';if(/\b(ai|llm|gpt|machine learning|neural|model|agent)\b/.test(tl))tp='ai_ml';else if(/\b(security|hack|breach|cyber|threat)\b/.test(tl))tp='security';else if(/\b(startup|funding|venture|valuation|ipo)\b/.test(tl))tp='business';results.push({json:{id:`gnews-${results.length+1}`,title:title.substring(0,150),source_name:sn,source_url:link,published_date:pd,topic_category:tp,content_snippet:title.substring(0,200),reliability_score:rs,collection_method:'google_news_rss'}})}return results;

const input=$input.first().json;const articles=input.articles||[];const results=[];for(const a of articles){const title=(a.title||'').trim();if(!title||title==='[Removed]')continue;let pd='';try{const d=new Date(a.publishedAt);if(!isNaN(d))pd=d.toISOString().split('T')[0]}catch(e){}if(!pd)continue;const sn=a.source?.name||'NewsAPI';const content=(a.description||a.content||'').replace(/<[^>]*>/g,'').trim();let rs=3;const sl=sn.toLowerCase();if(['reuters','associated press','bbc','bloomberg'].some(k=>sl.includes(k)))rs=5;else if(['techcrunch','wired','verge','ars technica','cnn','cnbc'].some(k=>sl.includes(k)))rs=4;const tl=title.toLowerCase();let tp='brand_marketing';if(/\b(ai|llm|gpt|machine learning|neural|model|agent)\b/.test(tl))tp='ai_ml';else if(/\b(security|hack|breach|cyber|threat)\b/.test(tl))tp='security';else if(/\b(startup|funding|venture|valuation|ipo)\b/.test(tl))tp='business';results.push({json:{id:`newsapi-${results.length+1}`,title:title.substring(0,150),source_name:sn,source_url:a.url||'',published_date:pd,topic_category:tp,content_snippet:(content||title).substring(0,200),reliability_score:rs,collection_method:'newsapi'}})}return results;

const input=$input.first().json;const rows=input.rows||[];const results=[];const catMap={'comp.graphics':'technology','comp.os.ms-windows.misc':'technology','comp.sys.ibm.pc.hardware':'technology','comp.sys.mac.hardware':'technology','comp.windows.x':'technology','misc.forsale':'business','sci.crypt':'security','sci.electronics':'technology','sci.space':'technology'};for(const row of rows){const r=row.row||row;const text=r.text||'';const label=r.label_text||r.label||'';const topic=catMap[label];if(!topic)continue;const lines=text.split('\n').filter(l=>l.trim().length>15);const title=(lines[0]||text.substring(0,100)).trim().substring(0,120);results.push({json:{id:`hf-${results.length+1}`,title,source_name:'20_newsgroups (HuggingFace)',source_url:'https://huggingface.co/datasets/SetFit/20_newsgroups',published_date:new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0],topic_category:topic,content_snippet:text.replace(/\n/g,' ').trim().substring(0,200),reliability_score:3,collection_method:'huggingface_dataset'}});if(results.length>=60)break}return results;

const items=$input.all();const seen=new Set();const clean=[];let dupes=0,invalid=0;for(const item of items){const d=item.json;if(!d.title||!d.published_date||!d.source_name){invalid++;continue}if(!/^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/.test(d.published_date)){invalid++;continue}const key=d.title.toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9]/g,'').substring(0,60);if(seen.has(key)){dupes++;continue}seen.add(key);if(!d.content_snippet||d.content_snippet.length<10)d.content_snippet=d.title;clean.push({json:d})}return clean;
